name: Company Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Beef chuck or round steak
15 ounces Can pinto beans or chili beans
recipeInstructions:
1. One day in advance, cut the beef into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add beef and stir until it changes color but does not brown. Reduce heat to low and stir in garlic.
3. Combine chili powder, cumin, and flour. Sprinkle meat with the chili mixture and stir until the meat is evenly coated. Stir in oregano. Add 2 cups of beef broth and stir until liquid is well blended. Add salt and pepper.
4. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally. Reduce heat and simmer partially covered over low heat for 1-1/2 hours. Add remaining broth and simmer an additional 30 minutes longer. The meat should be almost falling apart.
5. Cool thoroughly and refrigerate overnight to allow the flavors to "ripen." Reheat gently on top of a double boiler. Heat beans, drain, and stir into chili. Serve in individual bowls, adding a generous dollop of sour cream. Squeeze lime juice over each portion. Cut the remaining lime into wedges and place one wedge on each plate.
6. Serve with hot corn bread and various fresh fruits.
